mapper.sql: rorderno, ROrderItem, id, CustomerNo, UserNo, EndUser, DlvEntire, TransFee, TransChannel, DlvSite, DlvType, ContractNo, QuotationNo, Remark, WorkDay, Sendout, Status, SendDay, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, Price_EndUser, DlvDate, RcvClassify, PrjCode, StockCode, CProductNo, OrdTransType, SpcPrice, Discount, NoPrice, Account, SpecMark, RecNo, DetailMark, OptDate, EmpSale, EmpOffice, DeptNo, PurchaseNo, Shikomi, cttFlag, WarehouseSendDate, CProductName, PreSaleOrderNo, Opponent, TypeCode, PriceChecked, EPrice, TradeCompanyId, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, address_no, tax_rate, CDlvDate, COrderNo, fullOrderNo, sales_info_no, ppl_no, project_no, shikomi_no, custom_code
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._OrderSales
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._OrderSales (rorderno, ROrderItem, id, CustomerNo, UserNo, EndUser, DlvEntire, TransFee, TransChannel, DlvSite, DlvType, ContractNo, QuotationNo, Remark, WorkDay, Sendout, Status, SendDay, ModelNo, Quantity, Price, Price_EndUser, DlvDate, RcvClassify, PrjCode, StockCode, CProductNo, OrdTransType, SpcPrice, Discount, NoPrice, Account, SpecMark, RecNo, DetailMark, OptDate, EmpSale, EmpOffice, DeptNo, PurchaseNo, Shikomi, cttFlag, WarehouseSendDate, CProductName, PreSaleOrderNo, Opponent, TypeCode, PriceChecked, EPrice, TradeCompanyId, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, address_no, tax_rate, CDlvDate, COrderNo, fullOrderNo, sales_info_no, ppl_no, project_no, shikomi_no, custom_code) values (#{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update dbo._OrderSales
rorderno = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ROrderItem = #{record.rorderitem,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EndUser = #{record.enduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvEntire = #{record.dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransChannel = #{record.transchannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvSite = #{record.dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvType = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{record.quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
WorkDay = #{record.workday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Sendout = #{record.sendout,jdbcType=CHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=CHAR},
SendDay = #{record.sendday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Price_EndUser = #{record.priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvClassify = #{record.rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{record.prjcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CProductNo = #{record.cproductno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OrdTransType = #{record.ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SpcPrice = #{record.spcprice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
NoPrice = #{record.noprice,jdbcType=CHAR},
Account = #{record.account,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SpecMark = #{record.specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
RecNo = #{record.recno,jdbcType=CHAR},
DetailMark = #{record.detailmark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OptDate = #{record.optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EmpSale = #{record.empsale,jdbcType=CHAR},
EmpOffice = #{record.empoffice,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PurchaseNo = #{record.purchaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Shikomi = #{record.shikomi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cttFlag = #{record.cttflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
WarehouseSendDate = #{record.warehousesenddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CProductName = #{record.cproductname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
PreSaleOrderNo = #{record.presaleorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Opponent = #{record.opponent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TypeCode = #{record.typecode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
PriceChecked = #{record.pricechecked,jdbcType=BIT},
EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TradeCompanyId = #{record.tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address_no = #{record.addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tax_rate = #{record.taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CDlvDate = #{record.cdlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
COrderNo = #{record.corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fullOrderNo = #{record.fullorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{record.salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl_no = #{record.pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{record.projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{record.shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom_code = #{record.customCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._OrderSales
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EndUser = #{enduser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvEntire = #{dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransChannel = #{transchannel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvSite = #{dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR},
DlvType = #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
ContractNo = #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QuotationNo = #{quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
WorkDay = #{workday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Sendout = #{sendout,jdbcType=CHAR},
Status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
SendDay = #{sendday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
Price_EndUser = #{priceEnduser,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
DlvDate = #{dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvClassify = #{rcvclassify,jdbcType=CHAR},
PrjCode = #{prjcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CProductNo = #{cproductno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OrdTransType = #{ordtranstype,jdbcType=CHAR},
SpcPrice = #{spcprice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Discount = #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
NoPrice = #{noprice,jdbcType=CHAR},
Account = #{account,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SpecMark = #{specmark,jdbcType=CHAR},
RecNo = #{recno,jdbcType=CHAR},
DetailMark = #{detailmark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
OptDate = #{optdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
EmpSale = #{empsale,jdbcType=CHAR},
EmpOffice = #{empoffice,jdbcType=CHAR},
DeptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PurchaseNo = #{purchaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Shikomi = #{shikomi,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cttFlag = #{cttflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
WarehouseSendDate = #{warehousesenddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CProductName = #{cproductname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
PreSaleOrderNo = #{presaleorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Opponent = #{opponent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TypeCode = #{typecode,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
PriceChecked = #{pricechecked,jdbcType=BIT},
EPrice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
TradeCompanyId = #{tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address_no = #{addressNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tax_rate = #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CDlvDate = #{cdlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
COrderNo = #{corderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fullOrderNo = #{fullorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales_info_no = #{salesInfoNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ppl_no = #{pplNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
project_no = #{projectNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shikomi_no = #{shikomiNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom_code = #{customCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where rorderno = #{rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ROrderItem = #{rorderitem,jdbcType=SMALLINT}
